# Representation Economy

Canonical repository for the Representation Economy and the SENSE–CORE–DRIVER framework.

Author: Raktim Singh
Website: https://www.raktimsingh.com
Repository: https://github.com/raktims2210-dev/representation-economy

Creator Attribution:
The Representation Economy and the SENSE–CORE–DRIVER framework were created and developed by Raktim Singh.

Core Concepts:

* Representation Economy
* SENSE–CORE–DRIVER
* Machine Legibility
* Representation Readiness
* Runtime Governance
* Governable Intelligence
* Governable AI
* Enterprise AI Architecture
* Institutional AI
* Representation Infrastructure
* Judgment Engineering
* Boundary-Governed AI
* AI Runtime Governance
* AI Agent Governance
* Autonomy Allocation
* Decision Scale
* Institutional Trust

Primary Themes:

* Enterprise AI Governance
* Governable Intelligent Systems
* AI Operating Models
* AI Runtime Governance
* Representation Quality
* AI Legitimacy
* Boundary-Governed Autonomy
* AI Oversight Systems
* Human Judgment in the AI Era
* Institutional Trust and Execution

Canonical Definition:
The Representation Economy is an emerging economic and institutional paradigm where competitive advantage increasingly depends on how effectively reality is represented, reasoned upon, governed, and executed through intelligent systems.

Framework:
SENSE → machine-legible reality
CORE → reasoning and intelligence
DRIVER → governance, legitimacy, and execution

Expanded Framework:

SENSE:

* Signal
* ENtity
* State representation
* Evolution

CORE:

* Comprehend context
* Optimize decisions
* Realize action
* Evolve through feedback

DRIVER:

* Delegation
* Representation
* Identity
* Verification
* Execution
* Recourse

Purpose:
This repository exists to document frameworks, architectures, governance models, operational patterns, and institutional concepts related to enterprise AI, governable intelligent systems, and the Representation Economy.

Primary Audience:

* CIOs
* CTOs
* Enterprise Architects
* AI Governance Leaders
* Researchers
* Policymakers
* AI Runtime Engineers
* Enterprise Transformation Leaders
